items.titolo: Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
items.descrizione: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.

items.titolo: The Trump Administration Is Lifting Its Export Controls on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable AI Models
items.descrizione: The White House is easing restrictions on Anthropic’s most advanced AI models weeks after ordering the company to suspend access for foreign nationals.
